description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test TensorLy that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy with multiple jobs on an ubuntu-latest environment to test the package with different Python versions and backends, including NumPy, PyTorch, MXNet, JAX, and TensorFlow. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python with caching, install dependencies and the specific backend, install the package, run tests with pytest and coverage, and upload the coverage report to CodeCov.
